---
title: "Critical Appraisal: STROBE Checklist for Observational Studies"
subtitle: "[Study Reference]"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
---

# Study Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Title** | |
| **Authors** | |
| **Year** | |
| **Journal** | |
| **DOI** | |
| **Study Design** | ☐ Cohort  ☐ Case-control  ☐ Cross-sectional |
| **Appraiser** | |
| **Appraisal Date** | |

# STROBE Checklist

*Based on the Strengthening the Reporting of Observational Studies in Epidemiology (STROBE) Statement.*

## Title and Abstract

### 1. Title and abstract

**(a)** Indicate the study design in the title or abstract:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

**(b)** Provide an informative and balanced summary:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

## Introduction

### 2. Background/rationale

Explain scientific background and rationale:

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 3. Objectives

State specific objectives, including pre-specified hypotheses:

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

## Methods

### 4. Study design

Present key elements of study design early in the paper:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 5. Setting

Describe the setting, locations, and relevant dates:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 6. Participants

**(a)** Give eligibility criteria, sources and methods of selection, follow-up:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

**(b)** For matched studies, give matching criteria and number matched:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No  ☐ N/A

---

### 7. Variables

Define all outcomes, exposures, predictors, confounders:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 8. Data sources/measurement

Describe sources of data and assessment methods:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 9. Bias

Describe any efforts to address potential sources of bias:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 10. Study size

Explain how study size was arrived at:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 11. Quantitative variables

Explain how quantitative variables were handled in the analyses:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 12. Statistical methods

**(a)** Describe all statistical methods:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

**(b)** Describe methods for examining subgroups and interactions:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No  ☐ N/A

**(c)** Explain how missing data were addressed:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

**(d)** Describe any sensitivity analyses:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No  ☐ N/A

---

## Results

### 13. Participants

Report numbers at each stage (consider flow diagram):

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 14. Descriptive data

**(a)** Give characteristics of participants and information on exposures:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

**(b)** Indicate number with missing data per variable:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 15. Outcome data

Report number of outcome events or summary measures:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 16. Main results

**(a)** Give unadjusted and adjusted estimates with CI and p-values:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

**(b)** Report category boundaries for continuous variables:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No  ☐ N/A

**(c)** Report results of subgroup and interaction analyses:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No  ☐ N/A

---

### 17. Other analyses

Report other analyses (sensitivity, etc.):

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No  ☐ N/A

---

## Discussion

### 18. Key results

Summarize key results with reference to objectives:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 19. Limitations

Discuss limitations including bias:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 20. Interpretation

Give cautious overall interpretation:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

### 21. Generalizability

Discuss generalizability (external validity):

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

## Other Information

### 22. Funding

Give source of funding and role of funders:

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Partial  ☐ No

---

# Overall Assessment

| Section | Items Reported (Yes) | Items Partial | Items Not Reported |
|---------|---------------------|---------------|-------------------|
| Introduction (2–3) | | | |
| Methods (4–12) | | | |
| Results (13–17) | | | |
| Discussion (18–21) | | | |
| Other (22) | | | |

**Overall reporting quality summary**:

**Notes on applicability to review question**:
